markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on editorial progress, performance, and new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Editorial Strategy Shift:** Pausing refreshes of highly technical articles (e.g., "Hydrogen Embrittlement") to avoid author-review bottlenecks. The focus is now on net-new content for Forensics and repurposing high-performing articles from the acquired Sullivan company.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**Strong Performance:** Organic traffic to GrowthX articles has grown 2.5x since early Jan (31 → 80 sessions/week). High engagement rates (e.g., 80% on "Building Condition Assessments") confirm content quality and reader value.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [**New Tooling:** Rimkus is being onboarded to GrowthX's internal tool, "Check That," to track AI visibility. Matt will compare its data against Rimkus's current tool, "Profound," to ensure consistent reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Topics

### Editorial Strategy Shift

  - [**Problem:** Refreshing highly technical articles creates bottlenecks with author reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Example:** The "Hydrogen Embrittlement" refresh was flagged by the author for factual errors and a change in focus (case study → white paper).](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift focus to net-new content for Forensics.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Avoid refreshing articles with an attributed author or contact info, as these likely require expert review.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
      - [**Exception:** Continue with the "Leak Investigations" refresh, as it is not highly technical.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**Sullivan Repurposing:** Repurpose high-performing articles from the acquired Sullivan company to improve rankings for key terms (e.g., "Fathom").](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**New Topics:** Jennifer will provide new topic ideas for Construction Property Loss by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Organic Traffic Growth:** Sessions on GrowthX-published articles have grown from \~31/week (early Jan) to \>80/week.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [**High Engagement:** Engagement rates track session growth, confirming content quality and reader value.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [**Example:** "Building Condition Assessments" has an 80% engagement rate on 34 sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [**New Tool:** GrowthX is onboarding Rimkus to "Check That," its internal LLM visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [**Goal:** Track Rimkus's presence in AI-generated responses (e.g., Perplexity) vs. competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
      - [**Action:** Matt will compare "Check That" data against Rimkus's "Profound" reports to ensure consistent reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Reporting Needs:** Nohora needs to show wins for specific, high-priority terms (e.g., "Roof Consulting") to address internal questions.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jennifer:**](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [Provide new topic ideas for Construction Property Loss by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [Review the editorial roadmap for potential author-review issues.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [Request "Profound" reports from Alicia for comparison with "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [**Nohora:**](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [Email Matt the list of Sullivan articles for repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
      - [Share high-priority topics (e.g., "Roof Consulting") to guide content focus.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Conduct a keyword analysis on new topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [Audit Sullivan content and recommend a migration strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [Compare "Check That" and "Profound" reports to ensure data consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [Email Nohora the "LLM Visibility Win Report" for internal use.](https://fathom.video/share/zNEnxsPzDUBAFuBn5LW5gJqAxm4dGCwF?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
